job.title: .Net FullStack Developer - Senior Associate @ Acuity knowledge Partners (KA, IN)
job.description:
Job Description

**Job purpose**

**We are seeking an experienced .NET Full Stack Developer with strong expertise in .NET Core, React.js, SQL**

**Server, and Power BI to design, develop, and maintain enterprise-grade applications. The ideal candidate will**

**be responsible for delivering scalable web applications, developing APIs, creating responsive user interfaces,**

**and building insightful business intelligence dashboards to support data-driven decision-making.**

  

**Key responsibilities**

* **Design, develop, test, and maintain web applications using .NET Core, ASP.NET MVC, C#, and React.js.**

* **Build scalable RESTful APIs and backend services.**

* **Develop responsive and intuitive front-end applications using React.js and modern JavaScript frameworks.**

* **Design and optimize SQL Server databases, stored procedures, and queries.**

* **Develop and optimize Power BI reports and dashboards for business stakeholders.**

* **Collaborate with business analysts, product owners, and cross-functional teams to understand requirements** **and deliver solutions.**

* **Participate in technical design discussions and architecture reviews.**

* **Implement best practices for coding, security, performance optimization, and maintainability.**

* **Support AWS/Azure-based deployments, CI/CD processes and monitoring.**

* **Perform code reviews, unit testing, and troubleshoot production issues.**

* **Mentor junior developers and contribute to team knowledge sharing.**

  

**Key competencies**

**Technical Competencies**

* **Strong hands-on experience in C#, .NET 8/.NET Core/.NET Framework, ASP.NET MVC, and RESTful Web API**

**development.**

* **Proficiency in React.js, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, and Tailwind CSS for building modern,**

**responsive web applications.**

* **Strong SQL Server development expertise, including database design, query optimization, stored procedures** **and performance tuning.**

* **Experience developing interactive Power BI dashboards and reports, with strong knowledge of DAX and data**

**modeling concepts.**

* **Familiarity with AWS and Azure cloud services, cloud-native application development, and deployment best** **practices.**

* **Experience designing, developing, and supporting Microservices-based applications and distributed systems.**

* **Hands-on experience with Git, Azure DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, source control, and automated build and**

**release processes.**

* **Solid understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), software design patterns, SOLID principles, and** **Agile/Scrum methodologies.**

* **Experience integrating front-end applications with RESTful APIs and backend services.**

* **Exposure to modern development tools and AI-assisted coding platforms such as GitHub Copilot, Cursor,**

**Claude, and AI integration solutions is an added advantage.**

  

**Behavioral Competencies**

* **Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.**

* **Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.**

* **Ability to work independently and collaboratively within distributed teams.**

* **Strong ownership and accountability.**

* **Continuous learning mindset and adaptability.**

  

Job Snapshot

Job ID

JOB\_8007

Department

Data and Technology Services

Location

ETV -SEZ1, Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

Experience

4 - 8 Years

Employee Type

Permanent

job.title: Java Full Stack Developer @ Impronics Technologies (HR, IN)
job.description:
**Job Summary**

We are seeking a talented and motivated **Java Full Stack Developer** to join our development team. The ideal candidate will have strong experience in building scalable web applications using **Java, Spring Boot, React, and AWS**. You will be responsible for designing, developing, testing, and deploying high-quality software solutions while collaborating with cross-functional teams in an agile environment.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, develop, test, and maintain full-stack web applications using Java, Spring Boot, and React.
* Build and consume RESTful APIs and microservices.
* Develop responsive and user-friendly front-end applications using React.js.
* Implement secure, scalable, and high-performance backend services with Spring Boot.
* Deploy, monitor, and manage applications on AWS cloud services.
* Integrate applications with relational and NoSQL databases.
* Collaborate with product managers, designers, QA engineers, and other developers throughout the software development lifecycle.
* Participate in code reviews and ensure adherence to coding standards and best practices.
* Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance.
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices for automated deployments.

**Required Skills**

* Strong proficiency in **Java (8/11/17+)**
* Hands-on experience with **Spring Boot**, **Spring MVC**, **Spring Data JPA**, and **Spring Security**
* Experience developing RESTful APIs and microservices
* Strong knowledge of **React.js**, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3, and responsive UI development
* Experience with **AWS** services such as EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, ECS/EKS, CloudWatch, IAM, API Gateway, and CloudFormation
* Experience with relational databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, or Oracle
* Familiarity with Git, Maven/Gradle, and modern version control practices
* Experience with CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or AWS CodePipeline
* Understanding of Docker and Kubernetes is a plus
* Knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodologies
* Strong problem-solving, analytical, and communication skills

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
* 10+ years of experience in Java Full Stack development.
* AWS Certification (Associate or Professional) is a plus.
* Experience with event-driven architectures, messaging systems (Kafka/RabbitMQ), and distributed systems is an advantage.

**Technical Stack**

* **Backend:** Java, Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security, REST APIs, Microservices
* **Frontend:** React.js, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap/Material UI
* **Cloud:** AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, IAM, ECS/EKS, CloudWatch, API Gateway)
* **Database:** MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle
* **DevOps & Tools:** Git, Maven, Gradle, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Docker, Kubernetes
* **Methodology:** Agile, Scrum

job.title: BDE (Business Development Executive) (TN, IN)
job.description:
Business Development Executive – Upwork, Fiverr & IT Lead Generation

**Experience:** 1–4 Years  
**Employment Type:** Full-Time, Permanent  
**Working Days:** 5 Days a Week  
**Industry:** IT Services, Software Development and AI Solutions  
**Department:** Sales and Business Development  
**Role Category:** Business Development / Online Bidding / IT Sales

**Job Summary:**

We are looking for a proactive, self-driven and target-oriented Business Development Executive to research and identify potential clients through online tools, databases, and social media platforms and generate qualified leads and convert them into successful business opportunities. Example: Generate leads through platforms such as **Upwork, Fiverr, Freelancer, Guru, PeoplePerHour, LinkedIn and other online channels**.

The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience identifying relevant projects, preparing persuasive and customized proposals, communicating with domestic and international clients, conducting regular follow-ups and managing the complete sales cycle - from lead generation and requirement discovery to negotiation, deal closure, customer onboarding and payment realization.

The candidate will be responsible for generating business for our **AI solutions, software development, full-stack development, web and mobile applications, automation, cloud solutions, dedicated developer hiring and technology staffing services**.

This is a performance-driven role offering a **competitive fixed salary along with attractive incentives for every successfully converted lead or project**. Candidates who consistently generate revenue will have strong earning and career-growth opportunities.

Key Responsibilities

* Identify and pursue relevant business opportunities on Upwork, Fiverr, Freelancer, Guru, PeoplePerHour and other online marketplaces.
* Generate qualified leads through LinkedIn, email outreach, online directories, social media platforms, referrals and other digital channels.
* Handle inbound leads received through websites, marketing campaigns and assigned sources.
* Research suitable projects based on the company’s technical capabilities, target industries, project budgets and service offerings.
* Prepare personalized, persuasive and technically relevant proposals for each opportunity.
* Manage and optimize company profiles on Upwork, Fiverr and other online bidding platforms.
* Understand client requirements, business objectives, pain points, timelines and budgets.
* Qualify leads before involving technical, project management or delivery teams.
* Communicate confidently with prospects through chat, email, telephone and video meetings.
* Schedule and coordinate discovery calls, technical discussions, demonstrations and solution presentations.
* Work closely with technical teams to prepare project estimates, quotations, proposals and solution documents.
* Conduct regular follow-ups and maintain professional relationships with prospects throughout the sales cycle.
* Handle customer objections, negotiate pricing and commercial terms, and convert opportunities into confirmed projects.
* Take complete ownership of qualified leads until successful closure, customer onboarding and initial payment realization.
* Maintain accurate records of bids, leads, client conversations, follow-ups and opportunities in the CRM.
* Coordinate with internal teams to ensure a smooth transition from sales closure to project execution.
* Develop long-term relationships with existing clients and identify repeat business, upselling and cross-selling opportunities.
* Monitor competitor activities, market trends and frequently requested technologies or services.
* Achieve monthly targets for proposals, qualified leads, meetings, conversions and revenue.
* Maximize successful conversions to earn performance-based incentives on every eligible converted lead or project.

Required Skills and Experience

* 1–4 years of experience in IT business development, online bidding, lead generation, inside sales, B2B sales or software services sales.
* Hands-on experience generating leads and business through Upwork, Fiverr or similar online marketplaces.
* Strong understanding of the complete bidding process, including opportunity identification, proposal submission, follow-up, negotiation and deal closure.
* Excellent written English with the ability to prepare customized, professional and convincing proposals.
* Strong verbal communication, presentation, negotiation and relationship-building skills.
* Experience communicating with domestic and international clients.
* Ability to understand software development, AI, automation, web, mobile, cloud and full-stack development requirements.
* Proven ability to qualify leads and convert business opportunities into revenue.
* Experience using CRM tools to manage leads, follow-ups and sales pipelines.
* Strong research, prospecting, follow-up and closing capabilities.
* Target-oriented mindset with a strong sense of ownership and accountability.
* Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
* Willingness to occasionally adjust working hours for international client meetings.

Preferred Industry Experience

Experience in selling any of the following services will be an advantage:

* Artificial Intelligence implementation
* Generative AI, LLM and RAG solutions
* AI agents and workflow automation
* Custom software development
* Web and mobile application development
* Full-stack development
* React, Angular, Next.js, Node.js and Python development
* SaaS product development
* API and third-party platform integrations
* Cloud deployment and DevOps services
* CRM, ERP and business automation solutions
* Dedicated developer hiring
* Offshore development teams
* Staff augmentation and technology consulting

Compensation and Incentives

* Competitive fixed salary based on experience, skills and previous performance.
* **Attractive incentive for every successfully converted lead or project.**
* Incentives will be paid in addition to the fixed salary, as per the company’s incentive policy.
* Higher conversions and revenue generation will result in greater earning potential.
* Additional performance recognition may be provided for consistently exceeding monthly or quarterly sales targets.

Performance Indicators

The candidate’s performance will be evaluated based on:

* Number of relevant and personalized proposals submitted
* Qualified leads generated
* Proposal response and engagement rate
* Discovery meetings scheduled
* Number of successfully converted projects
* Proposal-to-conversion ratio
* Revenue generated
* Payments realized
* Achievement of monthly and quarterly targets
* Repeat business, upselling and client retention
* Accuracy of CRM and sales pipeline updates

Why Join Us?

* Opportunity to work with high-demand AI, software and digital transformation services.
* Exposure to international clients and global business opportunities.
* Freedom to explore Upwork, Fiverr, LinkedIn and multiple lead-generation channels.
* Ownership of the complete business development and sales cycle.
* Competitive fixed salary with incentives for every successful conversion.
* Strong earning potential for candidates who consistently generate business.
* Opportunity to work closely with technical and leadership teams.
* Career growth into Senior Business Development Executive, Business Development Manager or Sales Manager roles.

Education

**UG:** Any Graduate

Candidates with demonstrated experience in lead generation, online bidding and sales conversion will be given greater importance than educational qualifications.

**Ideal Candidate**

You will be a strong fit for this role if you are resourceful, persuasive, commercially aware and capable of taking ownership of revenue generation.

We are looking for someone who does not simply submit generic bids, but carefully researches every opportunity, understands the client’s requirements, prepares customized proposals, follows up consistently and moves conversations towards successful closure.

Key Skills:  
Lead Generation, Client Acquisition, Cold Calling, Business Development, Software Sales, IT Sales

Pay: ₹20,000.00 - ₹35,000.00 per month

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule
* Work from home

Work Location: In person

job.title: Laravel Developer @ Param Software (GJ, IN)
job.description:
* Rajkot
* Full Time

**Job Details**
---------------

**Job Overview**

We are looking for an experienced **Full Stack Laravel Developer** who is proficient in developing and maintaining robust ERP solutions. The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience in full-stack development using Laravel and a good understanding of business logic in ERP systems.

* Troubleshoot, test, and maintain the core product software and databases to ensure strong optimization and functionality.

job.title: Technical Manager - .Net Core @ Distinct Infotech (KL, IN)
job.description:
**Designation** – Technical Manager

**Department** - Technology / Engineering

**Reporting To** - Chief Operating Officer (COO)

**Location -** Carnival Infopark ( Work From Office)

**Job Summary**

The Technical Manager is responsible for leading the organization's technical strategy, software development teams, project execution, and technology innovation initiatives. The role involves managing technical resources, ensuring high-quality software delivery, driving architectural decisions, mentoring team members, and aligning technology solutions with business objectives.

**Key Responsibilities**

Technology Strategy & Architecture

* Define, implement, and guide technology roadmaps aligned with business objectives.
* Evaluate, recommend, and select appropriate technology stacks, frameworks, and architectural patterns.
* Ensure scalable, secure, and maintainable system architecture.
* Drive technology modernization initiatives and continuous improvement programs.
* Establish technical standards, development guidelines, and best practices across projects.

Code Review & Quality Assurance

* Oversee coding standards and conduct technical reviews to ensure code quality.
* Ensure adherence to software development best practices and design principles.
* Promote automated testing, quality assurance processes, and test-driven development practices.
* Champion CI/CD implementation and DevOps culture across teams.
* Monitor software quality metrics and ensure timely defect resolution.

Problem Solving & Technical Leadership

* Provide technical guidance and direction for complex development challenges.
* Act as the primary escalation point for critical technical and architectural issues.
* Conduct root cause analysis for production incidents and implement preventive measures.
* Optimize application performance, scalability, and security.

Research & Development (R&D)

* Stay updated with emerging technologies, industry trends, and best practices.
* Evaluate new tools, frameworks, and platforms for potential business adoption.
* Lead proof-of-concept (POC) initiatives and innovation projects.
* Recommend technology improvements that enhance productivity and business value.

**Team Management**

Leadership & Mentoring

* Lead and manage software developers, engineers, QA professionals, and technical teams.
* Foster a culture of collaboration, innovation, accountability, and continuous learning.
* Mentor team members in technical competencies, leadership skills, and career growth.
* Promote knowledge sharing and technical excellence across teams.

Hiring & Onboarding

* Participate in workforce planning and technical recruitment activities.
* Conduct technical interviews and candidate evaluations.
* Support onboarding, training, and integration of new team members.

Performance Management

* Conduct periodic performance reviews and provide constructive feedback.
* Define KPIs, goals, and development plans for team members.
* Monitor employee performance and ensure alignment with departmental and organizational objectives.
* Identify training needs and facilitate skill enhancement programs.

**Project Management**

Planning & Execution

* Translate business requirements into technical deliverables, project plans, and timelines.
* Collaborate with Product Managers, Business Analysts, and stakeholders to define project scopeand priorities.
* Ensure successful delivery of projects within agreed timelines, quality standards, and budgets.
* Monitor project progress and proactively address challenges.

Resource Allocation

* Allocate resources based on project requirements, technical expertise, and workload.
* Manage team capacity and optimize resource utilization.
* Resolve resource conflicts and ensure effective workload distribution.

Risk Management

* Identify technical risks, dependencies, and bottlenecks.
* Develop and implement mitigation strategies.
* Ensure business continuity through proper contingency planning.

Cross-Functional Collaboration

* Collaborate with Product, Design, QA, DevOps, Operations, and Business teams.
* Facilitate communication between technical and non-technical stakeholders.
* Represent the technology team in client meetings, management reviews, and stakeholder discussions.
* Support business development initiatives by providing technical insights and solutions.

Reporting & Communication

* Provide regular project status reports and team performance updates to the COO.
* Present technical recommendations and strategic initiatives to senior management.
* Maintain clear project documentation, technical specifications, and process records.
* Ensure effective communication across teams and departments.

Required Qualifications

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field.
* Master's Degree (preferred).
* 8+ years of software development experience with at least 3+ years in a technical leadership or management role.

**Required Skills & Competencies**

Technical Skills

* Software Architecture & Design
* Full Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC)
* Cloud Technologies (AWS, Azure, GCP)
* DevOps & CI/CD Practices
* Database Design & Optimization
* Application Security Best Practices
* Performance Tuning & Scalability
* AI Automation Experience
* Flutter Experience

Managerial Skills

* Team Leadership & Mentoring
* Strategic Planning
* Project Management
* Resource Management
* Risk Management
* Budgeting & Financial Awareness
* Stakeholder Management

Soft Skills

* Excellent Communication Skills
* Problem-Solving & Decision-Making
* Analytical Thinking
* Conflict Resolution
* Negotiation & Collaboration
* Time Management

**Preferred Certifications**

* PMP / PRINCE2
* Scrum Master Certification
* AWS/Azure/GCP Certifications
* ITIL Certification
* DevOps Certifications

Pay: ₹150,000.00 - ₹225,000.00 per month

Ability to commute/relocate:

* Kochi, Kerala (Kochi): Reliably commute or planning to relocate before starting work (Required)

Application Question(s):

* Are you an immediate joiner?

Experience:

* Team management: 4 years (Required)
* .NET Core: 8 years (Required)
* APIs: 8 years (Required)

Work Location: In person

job.title: Full Stack Developer @ NTT DATA (MH, IN)
job.description:
**Req ID:** 378627
  
  
NTT DATA strives to hire exceptional, innovative and passionate individuals who want to grow with us. If you want to be part of an inclusive, adaptable, and forward-thinking organization, apply now.
  
  
We are currently seeking a Full Stack Developer to join our team in Mumbai, Mahārāshtra (IN-MH), India (IN).
  
  
Key Responsibilities
  

* Design, develop, and maintain responsive and scalable web applications.
* Build intuitive and performant user interfaces using modern frontend frameworks.
* Develop robust backend services, APIs, and microservices to support business applications.
* Design and optimize relational and NoSQL database solutions.
* Implement secure, reusable, and maintainable code following industry best practices.
* Collaborate with product managers, designers, and engineering teams throughout the software development lifecycle.
* Participate in code reviews, testing, debugging, and performance optimization activities.
* Support application deployment, monitoring, and maintenance in cloud environments.
* Leverage AI-powered development tools, copilots, and LLM-based services to enhance productivity and solution capabilities.
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines and DevOps automation initiatives.

Required Technical Skills
  
  
Frontend Development
  

* Strong proficiency in React.js and/or Next.js
* Experience with TypeScript
* Hands-on experience with Tailwind CSS
* Strong understanding of modern frontend architecture, state management, and responsive design principles

Backend Development
  

* Proficiency in Node.js or Python
* Experience designing and developing RESTful APIs and/or GraphQL APIs
* Understanding of authentication, authorization, and API security best practices

Database Technologies
  

* Strong experience with PostgreSQL
* Experience with at least one NoSQL database such as:
* MongoDB
* Redis
* Knowledge of database design, optimization, and performance tuning

DevOps Cloud
  

* Working knowledge of Docker and containerized deployments
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation
* Hands-on experience with at least one cloud platform:
* AWS
* Microsoft Azure
* Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

AI Modern Development Practices
  

* Familiarity with Large Language Model (LLM) APIs
* Experience using AI coding assistants and copilots (e.g., GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Cursor, etc.)
* Understanding of prompt engineering and AI-assisted development workflows
* Exposure to integrating AI capabilities into applications is a plus

Required Qualifications
  

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science / Suitable, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.
* 3–5 years of professional experience in full stack application development.
* Strong problem-solving, analytical, and debugging skills.
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills.

Preferred Qualifications
  

* Experience with microservices architecture.
* Knowledge of automated testing frameworks and best practices.
* Familiarity with observability, monitoring, and logging tools.
* Exposure to AI-enabled application development and GenAI use cases.
* Experience working with enterprise-scale applications and cloud-native architectures.

About NTT DATA
  
  
NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune Global 100. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through responsible innovation. We are one of the world's leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with unmatched capabilities in enterprise-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and application services. our consulting and Industry solutions help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more than 50 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as established and start-up partners. NTT DATA is a part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each year in RD.
  
  
Whenever possible, we hire locally to NTT DATA offices or client sites. This ensures we can provide timely and effective support tailored to each client’s needs. While many positions offer remote or hybrid work options, these arrangements are subject to change based on client requirements. For employees near an NTT DATA office or client site, in-office attendance may be required for meetings or events, depending on business needs. At NTT DATA, we are committed to staying flexible and meeting the evolving needs of both our clients and employees. NTT DATA recruiters will never ask for payment or banking information and will only use @nttdata.com, @nttdatafed.com and @talent.nttdataservices.com email addresses. If you are requested to provide payment or disclose banking information, please submit a contact us form, https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact-us.
  
  
NTT DATA endeavors to make https://us.nttdata.com accessible to any and all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please contact us at https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact-us. This contact information is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications. NTT DATA is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. For our EEO Policy Statement, please click here. If you'd like more information on your EEO rights under the law, please click here. For Pay Transparency information, please click here.

job.title: Junior Solution Architect for System Design @ Designs Labpro (PB, IN)
job.description:
Junior Solution Architect / Technical Architect (Project Planning & System Design Only)

We are looking for an experienced Solution Architect / Technical Architect to design the complete technical blueprint for our software projects before development begins.

This is NOT a development or coding role. Your responsibility is to analyze our requirements and prepare a complete implementation plan that our development team can follow.

What You’ll Do

For every new software project (CRM, ERP, SaaS, Admin Panel, Mobile App, etc.), you will create a detailed technical plan covering every aspect of the system.

**Example:**

\* CRM Platform  
\* Admin Dashboard  
\* Payment Management System  
\* Gym Management Platform  
\* Coach Management  
\* Customer Portal  
\* Staff Portal  
\* Finance & Reporting

**Your Responsibilities**

Requirement Analysis

\* Understand the business workflow.  
\* Break down requirements into modules.  
\* Identify user roles and permissions.

System Architecture

\* Design the complete application architecture.  
\* Recommend frontend, backend, database, and cloud infrastructure.  
\* Explain why each technology is the best choice.

Database Design

\* Design SQL database schema.  
\* Create ER diagrams.  
\* Define tables, relationships, indexes, constraints, and naming conventions.  
\* Plan scalability and performance.

**User Roles & Permissions**

Example:

\* Super Admin  
\* Company Owner  
\* Manager  
\* Coach  
\* Staff  
\* Accountant  
\* Customer  
\* Member

Define exactly what each role can access and modify.

**Module Planning**

Examples:

\* Dashboard  
\* CRM  
\* Lead Management  
\* Member Management  
\* Coach Management  
\* Staff Management  
\* Attendance  
\* Payments  
\* Cash Payments  
\* Online Payments  
\* Subscription Plans  
\* Expenses  
\* Invoices  
\* Notifications  
\* Reports  
\* Audit Logs  
\* Settings

**Payment Planning**

Plan complete payment workflows including:

\* Cash Payments  
\* Manual Payments  
\* UPI  
\* Credit/Debit Cards  
\* Subscription Billing  
\* Payment Links  
\* Payment History  
\* Refunds  
\* Failed Payments  
\* Reconciliation  
\* Accounting Reports

**Technology Recommendations**

Recommend the best stack, such as:

\* Frontend Framework  
\* Backend Framework  
\* SQL Database  
\* Authentication  
\* Email Service  
\* SMS Provider  
\* Push Notifications  
\* File Storage  
\* Cloud Hosting  
\* CDN  
\* Cache  
\* Queue System  
\* Search Engine  
\* Logging  
\* Monitoring  
\* Analytics

**API Planning**

\* API documentation  
\* Endpoint mapping  
\* Authentication flow  
\* Third-party integrations  
\* Webhooks  
\* Error handling

**Documentation**

Prepare complete documentation including:

\* System Architecture  
\* Database Design  
\* ER Diagram  
\* API Specification  
\* Feature Mapping  
\* Workflow Diagrams  
\* User Flow  
\* Development Roadmap  
\* Milestones  
\* Technical Decisions  
\* Security Guidelines  
\* Deployment Strategy

**Example Project**

A Gym CRM Platform may include:

\* Super Admin Dashboard  
\* Gym Owner Dashboard  
\* Coach Portal  
\* Staff Portal  
\* Customer Portal  
\* Membership Management  
\* Cash & Online Payment Tracking  
\* Manual Payment Entry  
\* Subscription Management  
\* Reports & Analytics  
\* Notifications  
\* Attendance  
\* Workout & Nutrition Modules  
\* Invoice Generation  
\* Audit Logs

You will define exactly how every module works, how data flows between them, which SQL tables are required, which APIs are needed, and how the entire platform should be built.

**Required Skills**

* Solution Architecture
* System Design
* \* Database Architecture\* SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL)\* SaaS Architecture\* REST API Design\* Microservices (preferred)\* Cloud Architecture\* Security Best Practices\* UML / ER Diagrams\* Technical Documentation\* Business Process MappingDeliverablesWe expect a complete technical blueprint that allows developers to begin implementation immediately, with minimal clarification required. The documentation should include architecture diagrams, database schema, workflows, API planning, technology recommendations, security considerations, deployment strategy, and a structured development roadmap.

Pay: ₹25,000.00 - ₹40,000.00 per month

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Ludhiana, Punjab (Ludhiana)

job.title: React Developer @ NTT DATA (HR, IN)
job.description:
**Job Title:** Senior React + .NET Developer
  
  
**Job Summary:**  
We are looking for a highly skilled React + .NET Developer with strong experience in building modern web applications using React on the frontend and .NET / .NET Core on the backend. The ideal candidate should have solid hands-on expertise in developing scalable UI components, RESTful APIs, and end-to-end enterprise applications, along with a strong understanding of software design, performance, and integration patterns.
  
  
This role requires someone who can work across the full stack, collaborate with cross-functiona… teams, and deliver secure, maintainable, and high-performing solutions.
  
  
\*\*Key Responsibilitie…
  

* Design, develop, and maintain full stack web applications using React and C# / .NET Core
* Build responsive, reusable, and scalable frontend components using React
* Develop robust backend services and REST APIs using ASP.NET Core
* Integrate frontend and backend components seamlessly across application layers
* Write clean, maintainable, testable, and efficient code following best practices
* Work with relational databases and optimize queries for performance and scalability
* Collaborate with product managers, designers, QA, and other developers to deliver high-quality solutions
* Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve application issues across frontend and backend systems
* Participate in code reviews, technical design discussions, and architecture decisions
* Ensure application security, performance, reliability, and scalability
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines, deployment processes, and environment support
* Mentor junior developers and support engineering best practices

**\*\*Required Skills and Qualifications:** …
  

* Strong experience as a Full Stack Developer or React + .NET Developer
* Strong hands-on experience with React.js
* Strong proficiency in C#, .NET Core, and ASP.NET Core
* Experience building and consuming REST APIs
* Solid understanding of HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and TypeScript
* Experience with state management libraries such as Redux, Context API, or similar
* Good understanding of frontend architecture, component lifecycle, and performance optimization
* Experience with SQL Server or other relational databases
* Familiarity with Entity Framework / Entity Framework Core
* Experience with Git and version control best practices
* Understanding of object-oriented programming, design patterns, and clean architecture
* Experience with unit testing for frontend and backend applications
* Familiarity with Agile/Scrum development methodologies
* Strong problem-solving… debugging, and communication skills

**\*\*Preferred Qualifications:** …
  

* Experience with Azure or AWS
* Familiarity with microservices architecture
* Experience with Docker and containerized deployment
* Knowledge of authentication/… mechanisms such as JWT, OAuth
* Experience with CI/CD tools such as Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, or Jenkins
* Exposure to automated testing frameworks such as xUnit, NUnit, Jest, React Testing Library
* Experience with third-party API integrations
* Understanding of secure coding practices and application monitoring

**Key Competencies:**  

* Full stack application development
* Frontend engineering with React
* Backend API development with .NET Core
* Database design and optimization
* Performance tuning and debugging
* Cross-team collaboration
* Code quality and maintainability

**Sample Tech Stack:**  

* Frontend: React.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3
* Backend: C#, .NET Core, ASP.NET Core
* API: REST APIs
* Database: SQL Server
* ORM: Entity Framework Core
* Tools: Git, CI/CD, Docker
* Cloud: AWS

job.title: Full Stack Developer (Node.JS & React.JS) @ INFINITY ASSURANCE SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED (DL, IN)

**Job Title - Full Stack Developer (Node.JS & React.JS)**

(Multiple Openings, early joiners will be preferred)

**Work Location: U.S Complex, Adjacent to Jasola Apollo Metro Station, Mathura Road New Delhi-110076**

**Background of the Role:**

We @**Infinity Assurance** specialize in Warranty Service Administration, Extended Warranty, Accidental Damage Protection and a wide range of service products under our own brand “**Infyshield**.” Our offerings cover Mobile Phones, Home Appliances, Consumer Electronics, IT Equipment, Office Automation, AV Solutions, Classroom and Conference Room Technologies, Kitchen Appliances and more.

We have a very extensive Enterprise grade End to End Business Management Software Application that is unmatched in the industry.

The application has multiple Sub-applications and functionalities including Sales, Insurance Claims, Warranty Claims, Payments, Collections, Approvals, Billing / Invoicing, Payment / Tax / Bank Reconciliations, Partners Management, HRMS, Client Management etc. to suite end to end business needs of any enterprise.

**The application also has** **multiple integrations for Payment gateways, Voice calls, Video Calls, SMS, emails, WhatsApp, client applications, courier, Maps etc.**

To fuel our growth, we are inviting Software Developers as we are building our software development team to execute new business growth plans and a fresh product roadmap.

This position requires talents who are multi-skilled with hands-on experience; to work independently as well as in teams.

**Candidate Profile:**

* Must have previous application development experience in **JavaScript**, **ReactJS**, **NestJS**, Typescripts, HTML, CSS.
* Design, develop, and maintain server-side applications using **Node.js** frameworks
* Demonstrated experience in end-to-end **NextJS** development.
* Knowledge and experience in integrating frontend applications with RESTful APIs.
* Understanding of web security best practices.
* Experience in building responsive and visually appealing user interfaces
* Have good debugging, troubleshooting skills and best practices for performance improvement of the application
* Exposure to Android and iOS App development will be preferred

**Qualifications and Experience:**

* BE / B.Tech / ME / M.Tech. in CS or IT with a minimum of 3**+ years** professional experience (must mention the stream of engineering)
* Prior experience in developing **FINTECH / Customer Service / Logistics applications will be desire**

**Important Notes & Perks:**

* Attractive pay structure as per the Market Standards
* Huge career growth opportunity
* Preference will be given to candidates who can join early
* Should have worked in small teams with multi-skilled resources
* This is a full-time, work-from-office opportunity (Monday to Saturday; 6 days a week), based in South Delhi.
* *Applications may be submitted via google form as per the link:* ***https://forms.gle/qu2vmEkQUhjZyeZh6***

**About us:**

We, Infinity Assurance Solutions, Private Limited, a New Delhi-based portfolio company of Indian Angel Network, Aegis Centre for Entrepreneurship, Artha Venture Fund, eVista Venture and other marquee industry veterans; specialize in Warranty Service Administration, Extended Warranty, Accidental Damage Protection and various other service products for wide range of Mobile Phones, Home Appliances, Consumer Electronics, AV Solutions, Classroom / Conference-room Solutions, Kitchen Appliances, IT, Office automation, Personal Gadgets etc.

Incorporated in January 2014; as a debt-free, operationally profitable with positive net retained earnings, we have grown rapidly. Going forward, we are looking to grow multi-fold with newer areas of business expansion.

Our success is attributed to a very agile and technologically driven unique service delivery model, loyal long-term clients, in-house application, and lean organization structure.

More about us:

https://www.infinityassurance.com

job.title: Backend Developer @ Cidroy Technologies LLP (GA, IN)
job.description:
**Backend Developer — Node.js / TypeScript**

**Goa (Onsite) | 4+ Years Experience**

**The Work**

Most backend roles ask you to build dashboards and CRUD APIs. This one is different.

You will be working on a mission-critical Workforce Management Platform deployed in high-security, access-controlled environments, where the software directly governs who enters, who is tracked, and who is accountable at any given moment. The system integrates with physical infrastructure: biometric devices, RFID systems, IP cameras, RTSP streams, face recognition engines, and access control hardware. When it works, it is invisible. When it doesn't, operations stop.

This is a live, production platform used in demanding operational environments. You will be enhancing and scaling it, not greenfielding, which means your decisions carry real consequences for real deployments.

You will work directly with a founding team member. No layers, no ticket queues. Fast decisions, high ownership.

**What You Will Own**

* Backend services and business logic in Node.js and TypeScript
* REST API design, enhancement, and reliability at scale
* Integrations with hardware and real-world device ecosystems — RFID, biometrics, IP cameras, RTSP streams, face recognition, and access control systems
* Database architecture and query performance on MySQL
* Containerised deployment and environment management via Docker
* Diagnosing and resolving integration and production issues — you are the last line of defence
* Occasional frontend contributions where the backend-frontend boundary demands it

**What We Are Looking For**

**Must-have**

* 4+ years of backend or backend-heavy full stack development
* Production-grade Node.js and TypeScript, not tutorials, actual shipped systems
* REST API design experience at scale
* Strong MySQL — schema design, query optimisation, not just ORM usage
* Docker and containerised environments
* A genuine instinct for debugging — you find things others miss

**Strong advantage**

* Prior work with hardware integrations — RFID, biometrics, CCTV/IP cameras, RTSP, IoT, or access control systems
* Experience building software for Workforce Management, Industrial, Surveillance, or Security domains
* Comfort working in high-accountability environments where uptime is non-negotiable

**Who Thrives Here**

You are not looking for a role where requirements are handed to you fully formed. You want to understand the system end to end, take ownership of hard problems, and see your work running in production environments where it genuinely matters. You are comfortable with ambiguity, rigorous under pressure, and faster than average at figuring things out.

**Why Cidroy**

Cidroy builds software for environments where failure is not an option — defence-adjacent, industrial, and high-security deployments across India. You will be working on systems that interact with the physical world, not just the browser. The founding team is technical, the feedback loop is short, and the problems are real.

**Interested?**  
To apply for this role, please complete our screening form using the link below:  
https://forms.gle/1fMgsngGMTnGBnYx5

Application Question(s):

* Please fill the screening form mentioned in the Job Description. It will help us process your application faster.

Work Location: In person

job.title: Web Engineer II - Apply and Buy Digital Apps (L09) @ Synchrony (TS, IN)
job.description:
**Overview**
------------

* Location: Hyderabad, India; Pune, India; Delhi, India; Bengaluru, India; Kolkata, India
* Salary: N/A

**About Us**
------------

Synchrony is more than a financial services company, we’re a team of passionate innovators committed to delivering best-in-class solutions that support millions of customers across the U.S. With a bold focus on technology, data, and digital innovation, we create meaningful experiences that simplify lives and enable financial wellness.

When you join Synchrony, you become part of an inclusive culture where your voice matters, your growth is championed, and your work drives impactful results.

**Job Description**
-------------------

Job ID

2601881

Category

Technology

Date posted

07/16/2026

**Role Title****: Web Engineer II - and Buy Digital Apps (L09)**

**Company Overview** **:**Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) is a premier consumer financial services company delivering one of the industry’s most complete digitally enabled product suites. Our experience, expertise and scale encompass a broad spectrum of industries including digital, health and wellness, retail, telecommunications, home, auto, outdoors, pet and more.
  

* We have recently been ranked #2 among India’s Best Companies to Work for by Great Place to Work. We were among the Top 50 India’s Best Workplaces in Building a Culture of Innovation by All by GPTW and Top 25 among Best Workplaces in BFSI by GPTW. We have also been recognized by AmbitionBox Employee Choice Awards among the Top 20 Mid-Sized Companies, ranked #3 among Top Rated Companies for Women, and Top-Rated Financial Services Companies.
* We provide best-in-class employee benefits and programs that cater to work-life integration and overall well-being.
* We provide career advancement and upskilling opportunities for all to take up leadership roles.

**Organization Overview**

Synchrony's Engineering Team is a dynamic and innovative team dedicated to driving technological excellence. As a member of this Team, you'll play a pivotal role in designing and developing cutting-edge tech stack and solutions that redefine industry standards.

The Credit Card that we use every day to purchase our essentials and later settle the bills - A simple process that we all are used to on a day-to-day basis. Now, consider the vast complexity hidden behind this seemingly simple process, operating tirelessly for millions of cardholders. The sheer volume of data processed is mind-boggling. Fortunately, advanced technology stands ready to automate and manage this constant torrent of information, ensuring smooth transactions around the clock, 365 days a year.

Our collaborative environment encourages creative problem-solving and fosters career growth. Join us to work on diverse projects, from fintech to data analytics, and contribute to shaping the future of technology. If you're passionate about engineering and innovation, Synchrony's Engineering Team is the place to be.

**Role Summary/Purpose:**

**Web Engineer II**is a hands-on Full Stack Developer position within Partner & Product Integration, responsible for designing, developing, and supporting scalable partner onboarding and eCommerce integration solutions. The individual will contribute across the stack using **React, Node.js, and PHP**, and will work closely with cross-functional and geographically distributed teams to deliver high-quality features that enhance customer and partner journeys. The role also requires working knowledge of eCommerce platforms such as **Shopify and Magento**, including building and supporting integrations, customizing workflows, and troubleshooting production issues.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Build new web solutions/platforms and enhancements, working closely with requirements analysts, testers, and the customer in an agile development practice
* Design, build, and maintain modern web applications using **React (frontend) and Node.js / PHP (backend)**.
* Develop and support integrations with eCommerce platforms such as Shopify and Magento, including APIs, webhooks, and partner onboarding flows.
* Build reusable components, services, and APIs with a focus on performance, scalability, and maintainability.
* Collaborate with product, UX, QA, and operations teams throughout the SDLC—from requirements through development, testing, release, and post-production support.
* Participate in code reviews, ensure adherence to engineering standards, and promote best practices (security, reliability, and clean code).
* Troubleshoot and resolve defects across environments, including root-cause analysis for production issues and performance bottlenecks.
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines and automation efforts to improve deployment speed and release quality.
* Create and maintain technical documentation for features, APIs, integrations, and operational runbooks.
* Work effectively with geographically distributed teams and ensure timely delivery of committed work.
* Keep abreast of emerging technologies while maintaining proficiency in existing technologies

**Qualifications/Requirements:**

* Bachelor's degree in computer science or related degree with modern application development experience, with a minimum 2+ years of experience in Technology and in Software Development using **Node and React JS** or in lieu of a degree 4+ years of relevant experience.
* Minimum 2+ years of experience in Information Technology
* **Minimum 2 year of hands-on experience on scripting technologies including frameworks like Node, React and PHP is a must.**
* **Experience in developing applications using Shopify and/or Magento**
* Experience with Micro-Front end is a huge plus.
* Exposure to AWS is an added advantage.
* Ability to work/understand with CI/CD technologies.
* Good understanding of SQL/No SQL
* Good understanding of SDLC processes (Agile) and release management processes
* Willing to work flexible shift timings to be able to respond to emergencies
* Superior oral and written communication, analytical, and problem-solving skills

**Eligibility Criteria :**

Bachelor's degree in computer science or related degree with modern application development experience, with a minimum 2+ years of experience in Technology and in Software Development using **Node and React JS** or in lieu of a degree 4+ years of relevant experience.

**Work Timings:** **2PM - 11PM IST**

This role qualifies for Enhanced Flexibility offered in Synchrony India and will require the incumbent to be available between 06:00 AM Eastern Time – 11:30 AM Eastern Time (timings are anchored to US Eastern hours and will adjust twice a year locally). This window is for meetings with India and US teams. The remaining hours will be flexible for the employee to choose. Exceptions may periodically due to business needs)

We are proud to offer flexibility at Synchrony. Our way of working allows you the option to work from home or workspaces in our Regional Engagement Hubs—Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Pune, Kolkata, or Delhi/NCR.

Occasionally you may be required to commute or travel to Hyderabad or one of the Regional Engagement Hubs for in person engagement activities such as business or team meetings, trainings, and culture events.

**For Internal Applicants**:

Understand the criteria or mandatory skills required for the role, before

* ing
Inform your manager and HRM before* ing for any role on Workday
